## Inspector ID

`object_field_values`

## Purpose

Report, per key, value cardinality and a small value set when it looks like an enum.

## Usage

Inspectors take no configuration; they emit evidence — counts and distributions — for the reader to judge. Run this one over a corpus:

```
katalyst inspect <path> --inspector object_field_values
```
